name: Jerry Butler
abstract: Jerry Butler Jr. (December 8, 1939 – February 20, 2025) was an American soul singer-songwriter, producer, musician, and politician.

concerts.label: WLIB: 12th Annual Festival of Music and Drama

about_quotes.speaker: Chico Freeman
about_quotes.evidence: Coming from Chicago, there was groups like the Impressions, Curtis Mayfield, Jerry Butler, you know the Chicago groups that were there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chico Freeman interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 13, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Quinn Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: And we did a lot of recordings, back-up, with the Spanials,, Jerry Butler. This was all when we was with VeeJay.
